testcase.name: getsAndSetsDeclaredFields()

error.message: Unable to set field value org.flywaydb.core.ProgressModel.operation : operation

testcase.error: org.flywaydb.core.api.FlywayException: Unable to set field value org.flywaydb.core.ProgressModel.operation : operation at org.flywaydb.core.internal.util.ClassUtils.setFieldValue(ClassUtils.java:240) at flyway.ClassUtilsTest.getsAndSetsDeclaredFields(ClassUtilsTest.java:45) at java.base@25.0.2/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:565) at org.junit.platform.commons.util.ReflectionUtils.invokeMethod(ReflectionUtils.java:727) at org.junit.jupiter.engine.execution.MethodInvocation.proceed(MethodInvocation.java:60) at org.junit.jupiter.engine.execution.InvocationInterceptorChain$ValidatingInvocation.proceed(InvocationInterceptorChain.java:131) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertTimeoutPreemptively.lambda$submitTask$3(AssertTimeoutPreemptively.java:95) at java.base@25.0.2/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:328) at java.base@25.0.2/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1090) at java.base@25.0.2/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:614) at java.base@25.0.2/java.lang.Thread.runWith(Thread.java:1487) at java.base@25.0.2/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1474) at org.graalvm.nativeimage.builder/com.oracle.svm.core.thread.PlatformThreads.threadStartRoutine(PlatformThreads.java:820) at org.graalvm.nativeimage.builder/com.oracle.svm.core.thread.PlatformThreads.threadStartRoutine(PlatformThreads.java:796) Caused by: java.lang.NoSuchFieldException: operation at java.base@25.0.2/java.lang.Class.checkField(DynamicHub.java:1599) at java.base@25.0.2/java.lang.Class.getDeclaredField(DynamicHub.java:1774) at org.flywaydb.core.internal.util.ClassUtils.setFieldValue(ClassUtils.java:236) ... 13 more

testcase.name: readsStaticFieldsByName()

error.message: Unable to obtain field value org.flywaydb.core.api.Location.FILESYSTEM_PREFIX : FILESYSTEM_PREFIX

testcase.name: readsGettableFieldsAndValues()

failure.message: Expecting ArrayList: [] to contain: ["progress.operation", "progress.message", "progress.totalSteps", "progress.tag"] but could not find the following element(s): ["progress.operation", "progress.message", "progress.totalSteps", "progress.tag"]

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: Expecting ArrayList: [] to contain: ["progress.operation", "progress.message", "progress.totalSteps", "progress.tag"] but could not find the following element(s): ["progress.operation", "progress.message", "progress.totalSteps", "progress.tag"]
